name: Patient 27
history: Recent divorce with financial difficulties. Relationship since age 19. Has young son and settling child support. Adjusting to single parenthood.
intermediate_belief: My ex-partner will never cooperate or support our child properly.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm fighting a losing battle for my child's financial security.
coping_strategies: Legal navigation, single parenting, managing co-parenting conflict.
situation: Received email from ex-partner refusing to agree on child support and financial arrangements.
auto_thought: He's going to fight me on everything, and my son will suffer.
behavior: Read ex-partner's email refusing child support agreement.
